_comment: Market and language-specific skills for the Taibu AI OS 'Actions' launcher. The app ships a universal core (onboard, audit, level-up, dashboard, roast, find-skills) built in; this file adds everything else. A card only appears if the skill folder is actually installed in the user's project, so listing a skill here is safe even for users who don't have it. Labels resolve to the active UI language and fall back to English. Edit this file to add or reword an action: every installed OS picks it up on next launch, with no app release.

desc.en: Pull business leads from Google Maps into a CSV
desc.et: Korja Google Mapsist ettevõtete kontaktid CSV-sse
desc.de: Firmenkontakte aus Google Maps in eine CSV holen
desc.ru: Соберите контакты компаний из Google Maps в CSV

desc.en: Build an outreach sequence with several angles and A/B variants
desc.et: Ehita outreach-sekvents mitme nurga ja A/B variantidega
desc.de: Baue eine Outreach-Sequenz mit mehreren Ansätzen und A/B-Varianten
desc.ru: Соберите серию писем с разными углами и A/B вариантами

desc.en: Draft replies to leads who answered your campaign
desc.et: Koosta vastused leadidele, kes kampaaniale vastasid
desc.de: Entwürfe für Leads, die auf deine Kampagne geantwortet haben

desc.en: Pull real numbers from your Instantly campaigns
desc.et: Tõmba päris numbrid oma Instantly kampaaniatest
desc.de: Hole echte Zahlen aus deinen Instantly-Kampagnen
desc.ru: Получите реальные цифры из кампаний Instantly

desc.en: Generate pixel-exact ad images in your brand colours
desc.de: Erzeuge pixelgenaue Werbebilder in deinen Markenfarben
desc.ru: Создайте точные рекламные изображения в цветах бренда

desc.en: Generate an automation scenario you can import
Wrap up this session so the next one continues cleanly
desc.et: Võta sessioon kokku, et järgmine jätkaks sujuvalt
desc.de: Fasse die Session zusammen, damit die nächste nahtlos weitergeht
desc.ru: Подведите итог сессии, чтобы следующая продолжилась гладко
